tasks.title: Build "approval test" workflow
tasks.spec:
Outcome: A simple workflow with a Manual Trigger connected to a Set node named "approval test".

Trigger mode: Manual — the workflow is started by clicking 'Execute Workflow' in the n8n editor.

External systems: None.

Required effects: The Set node named "approval test" runs after the trigger and produces at least one output field (e.g. a field named `status` with value `approved`).

Required branches: No branching required. Single linear path: Manual Trigger → Set node.

Required data: Set node should set a simple static field to demonstrate the node works (e.g. `status: approved`).

Explicit constraints:
- The Set node must be named exactly "approval test".
- No external credentials or services required.

Empty/invalid behavior: No special handling needed — manual trigger always provides a single empty item.

Done when: Workflow saved with a Manual Trigger node connected to a Set node named "approval test". Verification run succeeds and the Set node output contains the configured field.

planningContext.summary: Build a single workflow with a Manual Trigger and a Set node named 'approval test', then run it to verify it works.

suspendPayload.message: Review the plan (1 task) before execution starts.
